case_title: SARAH DE GAUDEMAR et al VS. ADA H.C. KUNG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE GAUDEMAR, SARAH DE GAUDEMAR, OLIVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNG, ADA H.C. $4,195.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,245.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
